list.name: Changes
list.comment: Remove Dynamic Floating Text package and related assets

project.component: { "keyToString": { "Attach to Unity Editor.Attach to Unity Editor.executor": "Debug", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "rework__system__combat__level__score", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

component.name: RunManager
component.selected: Attach to Unity Editor.Attach to Unity Editor

option.name: PROGRAM_PARAMETERS
option.value: -runTests -batchmode -projectPath "E:\My project Unity\prototype project SSG" -testResults Logs/results.xml -logFile Logs/Editor.log -testPlatform EditMode -debugCodeOptimization
